description: STEP 10b DAY-4-7 LAPSE-SPECIFIC FILE — 8 April-EOM PREDs at d=3.96 past 2026-04-30 close, 6th consecutive poll with ZERO dome-side adjudication / acknowledgment / removal / window-extension. Per Step 10b 'Days 4-7 past close: severity MEDIUM, write a chg-* file specifically about the lapse'. The 8 PREDs (all still labeled 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' on predictions.html, all 'class="prediction pending"' div containers, no badge change, no result row, no commit-message mention in 14 post-prior-poll commits): PRED-077 (M2 Amplitude Variation <0.5% at Honolulu This Month, our_verdict=standard_physics); PRED-081 (JWST z<0.1 Type Ia SNe Show No Acceleration, our_verdict=standard_physics); PRED-085 (S-wave Shadow Zone 120°-160° Confirmed This Month, our_verdict=standard_physics); PRED-087 (Geoid Low Stationary GRACE Monthly, our_verdict=standard_physics); PRED-088 (Second Geoid Low at 70°N 135°W >-50m EGM2008, our_verdict=standard_physics); PRED-090 (NH TOA Flux Excess >0.3 W/m² in April 2026, our_verdict=recycled); PRED-106 (16 Hz Aetheric Field Increases Ca²+ Signaling >20%, our_verdict=pending); PRED-111 (Mascon >20 mGal at 30°S 60°E GRACE This Month, our_verdict=standard_physics). Predictions.html hash 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785/152936 — 28th CONSECUTIVE BYTE-IDENTICAL poll on this page / ~13.94 days since last text change. Status_history.json grew 537->549 (+12 entries from 12 Auto-update commits) but contains no PRED-NNN-keyed adjudication entries — auto-pipeline is not the path through which adjudication would arrive. The dome's daily-AI-review pipeline is the most likely adjudication path (build_daily_review.py 9144 bytes, ceddb04f) but the registry portion of daily_review.json has been gated for 3 consecutive HOLDs (#10/#11/#12) at 69 confirmed / 4 refined / 10 prospective — manual-approval-gate hypothesis crossed 3-event threshold at prior poll. If HOLD #13 (expected ~2026-05-04T07:30Z) also fires without a registry update, the gate-held interpretation hardens; if HOLD #13 produces a registry update, an adjudication batch is plausible in the same window. SILENT-IGNORE PATTERN: PRED-105 at d=15.96 (well past day-8+ HIGH severity) is the textbook precedent — closure date passes, dome takes no public action, prediction remains PENDING/PROSPECTIVE indefinitely; if the 8 EOM PREDs follow the same pattern, our_verdicts (currently 7x standard_physics, 1x recycled, 1x pending) would migrate to silent_ignore at d=8 per Step 10b and analyst's standing rule. Analyst should review at next analyst dispatch whether to begin pre-positioning silent_ignore verdict candidates for the 8 PREDs in advance of the d=8 boundary (~2026-05-08T00Z, ~4d from this poll).
before: 5 consecutive polls of zero adjudication on the 8 April-EOM PREDs (Step 10b day-1-3 SEVERITY LOW, no dedicated file required)
after: 6th consecutive poll of zero adjudication on the 8 April-EOM PREDs (d=3.96 past close, crosses into Step 10b day-4-7 SEVERITY MEDIUM threshold — dedicated chg-* required and emitted)
git_commit: n/a (silent-ignore-in-progress on 8 PREDs is by definition the absence of any commit; relevant commits since prior poll are 4f90c17..708773e, all auto, none adjudicating any of the 8)
